heading: Omitted
label: 1300n–5 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for governance of the tribe by an Interim Tribal Council until ratification of a final tribal constitution, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 106–568, title XIV, § 1407114 Stat. 2941Dec. 27, 2000
